name: eidos-transcoders-hub
description: Format pipeline transforms for AI agents — yaml to branded PDF, any document to two-host MP3 podcast. Free/fixed-cost renderers only.

interface.shortDescription: Turn documents into PDFs or podcasts — no paid APIs.
interface.longDescription: Transcoders are format pipeline transforms: feed a document in, get a different format out. Printable-report renders YAML as a branded PDF (reportlab). Podcast converts any document into a two-host MP3 briefing with River and Eric (edge-tts). Both use free, fixed-cost renderers — no API keys required.
defaultPrompt: Convert this YAML report to a branded PDF.
Turn this document into a podcast briefing.
Render this spec as a printable report.
